{{Quote|And naturally, I will make a contribution, without recompense, to the cause of the Empire Reborn.|Ucce|<ref name="TCS">''[[The Crystal Star]]''</ref>}}
[[Lady/Legends|Lady]] '''Ucce''' was a member of the [[Empire Reborn]], which was lead by the [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] [[Hethrir]], the former [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Procurator of Justice]]. She was rich and powerful, owning vast resources including [[Lady Ucce's starship|starships]] and having several followers and [[Slavery/Legends|slaves]]. She was served by an [[Ucce's servant|individual]] with starburst protuberances.

During a meeting with Hethrir in [[14 ABY/Legends|14 ABY]], Ucce was present along with Lords [[Qaqquqqu]] and [[Cnorec]]. When Hethrir suggested sending the then three-year old [[Anakin Solo]] back to where he came from, she suggested memory wiping Anakin and then putting him back, before concluding by saying that Hethrir was so wise. Like Qaqquqqu and Cnorec, she auctioned for children whom were held captive on Hethrir's [[Worldcraft]]. On that meeting, she won the auction and the right to sell them as slaves to the Imperial loyalists in Hethrir's trade gathering at [[Crseih Station]], which supported his achievements.

During the meeting, she and Qaqquqqu witnessed Hethrir use [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] to murder Cnorec for disagreeing with him. She was later present during a ceremony to sacrifice Anakin Solo to [[Waru]] at Crseih Station.
